headline: Will CBOE (CBOE) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: CBOE (CBOE) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: CBOE (CBOE) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's What You Should Know
summary: CBOE (CBOE) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.
